ddls:
CREATE TABLE "projects" (
  "project_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each project */,
  "project_name" TEXT /* Name of the project */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the project */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date the project was created */,
  "project_language" TEXT /* The programming language used in the project */,
  "project_framework" TEXT /* The framework used in the project */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("project_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "code_entities" (
  "entity_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each code entity */,
  "project_id" INTEGER /* ID of the project the entity belongs to */,
  "entity_type" TEXT /* Type of the entity (e.g., class, method, function) */,
  "entity_name" TEXT /* Name of the entity */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the entity */,
  "entity_complexity" INTEGER /* The complexity of the code entity */,
  "entity_cohesion" INTEGER /* The cohesion of the code entity */,
  "entity_coupling" INTEGER /* The coupling of the code entity */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("entity_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_code_entities_project_id FOREIGN KEY ("project_id") REFERENCES projects ("project_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "issues" (
  "issue_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each issue */,
  "entity_id" INTEGER /* ID of the entity the issue belongs to */,
  "issue_type" TEXT /* Type of the issue (e.g., coding standard, security vulnerability) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the issue */,
  "severity" TEXT /* Severity of the issue (e.g., low, medium, high) */,
  "issue_severity_level" INTEGER /* The severity level of the issue */,
  "issue_priority" INTEGER /* The priority of the issue */,
  "issue_status" TEXT /* The status of the issue */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("issue_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_issues_entity_id FOREIGN KEY ("entity_id") REFERENCES code_entities ("entity_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "issue_counts" (
  "entity_id" INTEGER /* ID of the entity */,
  "issues_added" INTEGER /* Number of issues added */,
  "issues_fixed" INTEGER /* Number of issues fixed */,
  "issues_remaining" INTEGER /* Number of issues remaining */,
  "issue_counts_date" TEXT /* The date when the issue counts were last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("entity_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "technical_debt" (
  "entity_id" INTEGER /* ID of the entity */,
  "debt" TEXT /* Technical debt for the entity (in hours and minutes) */,
  "debt_diff" TEXT /* Difference in technical debt (in hours and minutes) */,
  "debt_priority" INTEGER /* The priority of the technical debt */,
  "debt_status" TEXT /* The status of the technical debt */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("entity_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "tools" (
  "tool_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each tool */,
  "tool_name" TEXT /* Name of the tool */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the tool */,
  "tool_version" TEXT /* The version of the tool */,
  "tool_settings" TEXT /* The settings used for the tool */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("tool_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "tool_runs" (
  "run_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each tool run */,
  "entity_id" INTEGER /* ID of the entity the tool was run on */,
  "tool_id" INTEGER /* ID of the tool used */,
  "run_date" TEXT /* Date the tool was run */,
  "run_settings" TEXT /* The settings used for the tool run */,
  "run_output" TEXT /* The output of the tool run */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("run_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_tool_runs_tool_id FOREIGN KEY ("tool_id") REFERENCES tools ("tool_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_tool_runs_entity_id FOREIGN KEY ("entity_id") REFERENCES code_entities ("entity_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "results" (
  "result_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each result */,
  "run_id" INTEGER /* ID of the tool run the result belongs to */,
  "result" TEXT /* Result of the tool run */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the result */,
  "result_details" TEXT /* Detailed information about the result */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("result_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_results_run_id FOREIGN KEY ("run_id") REFERENCES tool_runs ("run_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., developer, manager, admin) */,
  "user_password" TEXT /* The password of the user */,
  "user_last_login" TEXT /* The date and time of the user's last login */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the platform */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the platform was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, edit) */,
  "access_ip" TEXT /* The IP address of the user who accessed the platform */,
  "access_user_agent" TEXT /* The user agent of the user who accessed the platform */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
